sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114750" key="xronokratew" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρονοκρᾰτ-εω</orth>, Astrol., <sense id="n114750.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be dominant for a specified period,</tr_> Vett. Val.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4024.tlg001:186:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">186.4</biblScope> </bibl>; also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρονοκρᾰτ-ορέω</orth>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4024.tlg001:276:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">276.10</biblScope> </bibl>: hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρονοκρᾰτ-ορία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4024.tlg001:165:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">165.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
